role_in_synthesis: Sprint-002 DF-03 record: historical perpetual funding rates and exact cash-flow times; PIT risk is discrete accrual times and contract specifications in force; required test is replay a known funding payment against the contract formula at that timestamp. Does NOT attribute position-dependent or common-numeraire requirements to E01.

RD-02 (CARRY-01 funding leg, points to DF-03): Binance monthly funding archive acquired with `last_funding_rate` and observed 8h interval; OKX/Bybit funding history reachable as incremental evidence; actual funding settlements determine cashflows; next action is capture fundingInterval/formulaType per timestamp and never project current interval/formula backward. RD-02 predates and does NOT record FUND-001/002/003 decisions and grants NO implementation authority (feasibility statement/next action only).
FUND-001 readiness/substrate accepted; establishes that a funding event is not itself a position-dependent realized cashflow. Preserved.
Readiness report: substrate/plan accepted; funding-event-vs-realized-cashflow separation is a recognized gap, not implementation authority.
Accepts FUND-001 and authorizes FUND-002 source-semantics audit; establishes FUND-001 funding event is not position-dependent realized cashflow. Implementation blocked.
Binance funding-rate source semantics; accepted with NO_IMPLEMENTATION_AUTHORITY. Final status evidence, not primary legal-semantics evidence.

Documents Binance archive fields `calc_time`, `funding_interval_hours`, `last_funding_rate` (matched against REST `fundingRate`/`fundingTime`, not relabeled); Binance report + licensing gate. Does not authorize a realized cashflow normalizer.

Gate results underpinning FUND-002 NO_IMPLEMENTATION_AUTHORITY, incl. licensing/redistribution terms gate (FUND002-G06) and calc_time classification; primary Binance licensing/semantics evidence. Retained as prior accepted evidence.
Accepts FUND-002 as NO_IMPLEMENTATION_AUTHORITY. Final status evidence, not primary legal-semantics evidence.
OKX funding archive source semantics; accepted with NO_IMPLEMENTATION_AUTHORITY. Final status evidence, not primary legal-semantics evidence.

Accepts FUND-003 as NO_IMPLEMENTATION_AUTHORITY. Final status evidence, not primary legal-semantics evidence.
